rulings.Case Title: ALFONZO PORTILLO VS. SWARAN SINGH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 1, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs SWARAN SINGH and KAPAL SINGH's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend, only on the basis of whether the contract was written, oral, or implied by conduct.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES FAHEY VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc. Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 1, 2017 line 4. Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc.'s Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to causes of action for breach of written contract and breach of oral contract. It is OVERRULED as to the cause of action for promissory estoppel. Consideration is not an element of the claim, and Plaintiff properly alleges damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHIAN MIN YAU VS. ANN ROHRS ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 1, 2017 line 5. PLAINTIFF CHIAN YAU's Motion For Judgment For Possession Pursuant To Stipulation OFF CALENDAR - untimely. Failed to account for additional five days for mailing.= (501/REQ)
